subcodes.first_line: Whatsoever occurreth in the world of being is light for His loved ones and fire for the people of sedition and strife. Even if all the losses of the world were to be sustained by one of the friends
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه در عالم واقع شود از برای اولیای حق نور است و از برای اهل شقاق و نفاق
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
